backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing a used-car dealership backend with admin-gated car CRUD, booking management, user profile storage, and access control via a mixin authorization module.
backend/migration.mo: Defines old and new actor state shapes for upgrade migrations; the current `run` function is a no-op pass-through since the schemas are identical.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the user's custom logo was added to the left of the Trusted Cars wordmark in both the Header and Footer components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes (e.g., Tailwind class fixes).
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind layers and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with a public layout (Header/Footer/WhatsApp) for customer pages and a separate admin layout for login and dashboard routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingMan: Admin table component that displays test drive bookings with status update dropdowns, loading skeletons, and a CSV export feature.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarForm.ts: Admin modal form for adding or editing a car listing, with fields for all car attributes, auto-slug generation, validation, and image URL management.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarManagem: Admin table component that displays all cars with options to edit, delete, and mark as sold, using React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations with loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a car's image, specs grid, price/EMI, status/featured badges, and navigates to the car detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/EnquiryModal.tsx: Modal dialog that collects a user's name and phone number for a car enquiry, with validation and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logos, quick navigation links, and contact information (address, phone, email) for Trusted Cars dealership in Karol Bagh, Delhi.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a fixed responsive header with dual brand logos, desktop/mobile navigation links, a phone call button, and scroll-aware shadow styling.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySlid: A carousel image gallery component with prev/next navigation, thumbnail strip, image counter, and a fullscreen lightbox overlay.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp chat button linking to the dealership's WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access with admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for car and booking CRUD operations, wrapping backend actor calls for queries (getCars, getFeaturedCars, getCarBySlug, getBookings) and mutations (add, update, delete, markSold, updateBookingStatus).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a white/red/black brand color scheme via CSS custom properties, and defines utility classes for brand colors and line clamping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Protected admin dashboard showing summary stats (total/available/sold cars, pending bookings) and tabbed management tables for cars and bookings. Redirects to login if not authenticated.
Admin login form that authenticates via useAdminLogin mutation and stores session state in localStorage. Redirects to the dashboard on success or shows an error message on failure.
frontend/src/pages/BookTestDrivePage.tsx: Page component for booking a test drive, featuring a validated form with customer details and time slot selection that submits a booking via the useAddBooking mutation and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/pages/CarDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single car fetched by slug, including an image gallery, specs, pricing, and an enquiry modal. Also dynamically updates the page title and meta description for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/CarsPage.tsx: Lists all available cars with client-side filtering by budget, brand, fuel type, transmission, and year. Renders a filter panel alongside a grid of CarCard components with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public-facing home page with a hero section, featured cars carousel, 'Why Choose Us' highlights, and customer reviews. Uses useGetFeaturedCars to fetch and display featured listings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with brand colors (red/black/white), oklch CSS variable-based theming, custom fonts, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for 'Trusted Cars' dealership website, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, known issues, and versioned feature metadata for a React frontend with admin panel.
